title: No Sales Pitch.
description: If your project isn't a fit, I'll say so. If there's something I haven't done before, I'll say that too. You don't pay for my learning curve.

title: Real Deadlines.
description: I'll give you a finish date I can actually hit. If that changes, you'll hear it from me early, with a reason and a new date.

title: No Surprises.
description: The price in the proposal is the price you pay. If you want to change the scope, we talk about it first.
